creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To keep the size of the /etc/services file within reason, FreeBSD's 
/etc/services is deliberately not exhaustive.  Ports are only 
added for sevices that FreeBSD might be expected to use.  If you 
can make a case for that, we'll consider adding this port. 

Since I can't even find significant references to this protocol 
I'm closing this PR for now.
